title: Present for Every Man God Puts in Front of You
caption:
You put your phone down to pray. Put it down for the man sitting across from you too.

Your phone makes you feel connected while you quietly disappear from the people actually in the room. A full feed and an empty conversation is not connection. It is absence with a screen glow.

Fighting the phone does not mean fighting the room. Silence the notifications, not the people. Give one hour this week to whoever is in front of you. Phone off, not face down, off.

The world cannot reach you for sixty minutes. The man in front of you finally can.

#faith #presence #christianman #godlyman #brotherhood #phonefree #discipline #digitaldetox
